title: PayPal Announces Strategic Reorganization To Accelerate Growth
text: PayPal announced a strategic reorganization into three business segments: Checkout Solutions & PayPal, Consumer Financial Services & Venmo, and Payment Services & Crypto. The company appointed Enrique Lores as President and CEO effective March 1, 2026, succeeding Alex Chriss. Lores previously served as President and CEO of HP Inc. for over six years. Under the new structure, Frank Keller was appointed President of Checkout Solutions & PayPal; Alexis Sowa appointed interim lead of Consumer Financial Services & Venmo; and Jeff Pomeroy appointed interim lead of Payment Services & Crypto. Antonio Lucio joined as Chief Marketing & Corporate Affairs Officer, and Anshu Bhardwaj was appointed Chief AI Transformation & Simplification Officer. CEO Lores stated the company needs to recommit to fundamentals: get closer to the consumer, align around three strong businesses, simplify operations, sharpen accountability, and prioritize operational excellence. The reorganization aims to generate at least $1.5 billion in gross run-rate savings. Effective June 2, 2026, Michelle Gill and Diego Scotti departed from their executive roles.
